input.value:
timeseries responseTime_p{{ .percentile }}_timeseries = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, {{ .percentile }}),
  filter: dt.entity.service.name == "{{ .serviceName }}" and dt.endpoint.name == "{{ .endpointName }}",
  nonempty: true
| fieldsAdd metricName = "Response time p{{ .percentile }}"

properties.value:
❗**Alert description:**
An anomaly was detected on {metricname}. Within the sliding window, {violating_samples} violation samples were detected that were {alert_condition} the adaptive baseline.
